hypothesis: He hoped there would be soup for dinner, turnips and carrots and bruised potatoes and fat, but pieces to be laid out of thick, peppered, flour-fattened sauce. Stuffed into you, his belly comes to him. After early nightfall, the old lamps would light up near there, the squall of the order of the brothels. Where's the good in life? Number ten, fresh and elegant way from you. Connect us then, the music came nearer and you would call the words, the words of Shelley's fragment on the moon, wandering and hand-less, paid-off of weirdness. The dull light fell though a faint thing upon the page, where all another equation began to unfold itself slowly, and to spread it wrong in its wider tail. A cold, lucid indifference, great in its soul. The chaos in which his monitoring exchange itself is a wholly different knowledge of itself.
